title: Elbaf Reveals Its Giants
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Nami, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Luffy as Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.
scene: Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It started back while our captains were missing...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: See, Elbaf has another prince.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: when he was born they called him the "accursed Prince."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's devoted himself to darkness, and a few years ago, he was sentenced to crucifixion.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He tried to flee, but we warriors all came together to catch him.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: WHA-?! all the warriors of Elbaf?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hm? His name wouldn't happen to be!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Yeah... He's not right in the head.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You see, there's a legendary devil fruit said to be passed down through the Royal family...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His desire to eat it was so great that he killed his own father, King Harold!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's why we won't let the accused Prince loose again. If low ever does escape...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It'll be the end of everything!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: He's the shame of Elbaf!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: State your name.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'm Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The man who's gonna be King of the Pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: KING...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Where is this place?! Who are you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is warland!! The mighty kingdom of Elbaf!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They say it is the birthplace of war!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's shaking again!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am the sun god who will bring about the end of the world!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: LOK!!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Opens through 23 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
